title: Delicious Syrian Almond Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish made with tender almonds and sweet tagine. The perfect combination of Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together sliced almonds, chopped tagine, ground malty, and ground syrian.
Add melted molten butter to the bowl and mix until the almonds are well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the almonds are lightly toasted.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
